facts.value: early twenties
shoulder-length, worn loose, warm dark red; highlights spark to copper only in direct sun
snub, tipped up
lavish scale — full breasts, deep waist, hips with real width; Anna Nicole Smith proportions
One cracked screen, dropped once, never fixed, doesn't care; holds a thousand photos, mostly people mid-laugh, not a curated feed
Kept, transformed, ownable as fuel — hers

Clean white sneakers (Air Force 1s or dupe) as everyday default, cork/Birkenstock-type sandals for warm days, separate training shoes, tall faux-leather boots for cold, one or two pairs of block-heel going-out shoes
Evaluation — being found wanting, compared, judged
Active seeker, not a passive object selected by Pace and Randi; she seeks what they are uniquely positioned to provide
tall
Permanent; functions as the appetite's new operating system, not its replacement
Bravery is hers (a kept capacity)
Shares a standard double dorm with Cassie — bunk beds (took the top), two desks, bathroom shared through connecting door with next room
Practitioner whose refusal is locally relocatable; this equips her to walk out.
Permanent and does not turn off; she will look for full aliveness for the rest of her life
A good backpack bought once, well-used, full because she carries her life in it but knows what's in it; tidy-enough
chestnut freckles across the nose and tops of the cheeks
moves like an athlete — low center, real balance, plainly trained
takes up plenty of room

Two pairs of good jeans rotated, soft tees and sweaters, hard-working denim jacket, a flannel, leggings, gym leggings, a couple supportive sports bras, a going-out top or two, one good pair of black pants, a faux-leather jacket from the outlet, one or two club dresses she restyles
Does not perceive the coordination between Pace and Randi
generous curves, a 7-8, abundant
green (blue as fallback)

value.claim: The threesome itself was the wound
value.correct_statement: The threesome itself was not the wound; the threesome with Randi specifically was the wound

value.claim: Fine would keep Vee / Vee would remain with Fine
value.correct_statement: Fine was not going to keep her

facts.value: junior in college
appetite for full aliveness
red
Her side is lived-in and unfussy — comfortable, not a wreck and not curated
conservative; shame and desire wired together
A hungering apparatus; she possesses the relational equipment hunger requires (asking, receiving, being-vulnerable, trusting)
The only carrier who walks out with the long spoon
Has a partial scholarship covering the housing premium; only reason she's on campus rather than somewhere cheaper
Cannot be switched off; part of how the appetite now operates
Appetite for full aliveness; constitutive, operating from before the novel begins, not separable from her identity
Eats like a junior — dining hall, late-night pizza, communal floor food; an enthusiastic eater
Knows what she likes and what suits her; shops cheap places (TJ Maxx) with a good eye; put-together-on-a-budget skill; has taste and less money
Everything besides the pearls is mall jewelry she's not precious about
A duffel she packs casually but competently; bought once she started staying at Pace's
her feet do a 'small happy thing' when her appetite succeeds
Has a 'newly-undefended body' that now expects attention operating at a high resolution
The appetite seeks intensity and therefore seeks configurations involving destructive appetites; the destructiveness is in the appetite itself
Her apparatus has integrated the new register into her existing capacities.
Arousal driven by a humiliation/exposure dynamic that can be engaged in opposite directions — toward safety or toward exposure
From Latin 'vivus' meaning alive/living; intended to be felt before parsed (load-bearing)
The consciousness the reader inhabits most fully (primary POV character)
Grandmother's pearl earrings — the only genuinely good object she owns; came from love, not money; wears them most days, casually
M (masochist) — the arousal-humiliation loop; extraordinarily responsive; extraordinarily skilled at receiving

Her appetite for full aliveness would eventually bring her into proximity with destructive appetites, making a version of the catastrophe structurally inevitable regardless of the specific people involved
working-class pride; reads menu prices before food
Constitutionally hungry; carries a formative appetite so long-standing it reads as the texture of her being
settled, grounded, warm, unguarded; comfortable in herself
aliveness as steadiness plus warmth — absence of any need to perform
broke, but unbothered; money-consciousness is a light background hum, never martyrdom
Easy generosity is in the having — hands over a pen because she has one, not a rummage through filth
V.T. = Virginia Tech
Had only 'crackers' — fine men, fine friendships, fine pleasures, none formative; she did not name the hunger
command and abundance in the same frame, neither canceling the other
Exposure — admitting things, being seen responding, being told what to do
blue collar
'Vivienne' used only when the prose wants weight (e.g., a deliberate use by Pace, formal signature, or her mother's anger)
nurse
Cannot distinguish her own authentic desires from desires cultivated in her by how she is loved
cheerful cotton multipack
Knows specifically what she is refusing
synchronized swimmer; control is real
Money is real but doesn't run her mood; runs it close, plans around it, occasional joyful splurges, accepts ramen weeks as the cost; generous within her means
each brave step is a step into the appetite's trap; she experiences only the step, the reader on second read sees the trap
lush — abundant, ripe, fertile
one good pair, lace, soft blush / deep wine / grown-up black (not red); delicate, a little daring for her
Seeks sex engaging all three registers simultaneously at maximum density; this is what her appetite has sought from the start
Called 'Vee' in casual register
the response to her appetite requires overriding shame; the overriding feels like, and is, bravery
Has a waxed sex (depicted in sext imagery)
Has always had the relational equipment hunger requires — the asking, the receiving, the being-vulnerable-in-the-needed-way.
Her interior is now open at registers it was not before; new depths function as new exposure-channels.
could fill the leggings-and-crop uniform better than most of the room
always constitutionally hungering — twenty years of fine men/sex/relationships experienced as insufficient 'crackers'; hunger ambient and unnamed until fed a 'meal'
Pace — thinking about him, replay, anticipation, reframing past encounters, planning the next night; her week is structured around this
Experiences her own bodily arousal (wetness) reframed as evidence of successful connection rather than shame; this reframe is permanent and she retains it
Capable of asking, receiving, being vulnerable, and trusting
Ownership not suppression
Names the hunger only as 'Fine was not going to keep her' — the available register for it
careless dresser / pure function; good jeans, soft top, denim jacket, white sneakers, hair down
laughs because genuinely happy; does not have to manage herself
Handles her own money; pride is about not being provided for, tied to the relationship not the bank balance
The no, the hunger, and the ascent are all permanent and coexisting
Craves intensity that, in this world, is produced only by appetites that destroy; full aliveness is inseparable from the destructiveness of the appetites producing it

Becomes more vulnerable and braver concurrently across the year; the two are the same operation seen from two angles — vulnerability is new interior depth (exposure-channels), bravery is the apparatus integrating that new register into existing capacities. Both faces increase at the same rate by the same operation.
Randi and the SATC lunches — valued as confessional intimacy and 'shame-as-fuel,' experienced as enhancement rather than core
Engages emotionally through the safety of wit rather than directness
Third member of the destructive-appetite class
Experiences Pace's attention as the realization of her own desires
not consciously deciding to be brave; consciously responding to what her appetite has recognized
Block heels not stiletto because she can actually walk in them; stiletto reads as trying-too-hard against her self-image; tells herself she chose the sensible one for style
masochistic; rooted in feeling unworthy of love and finding sexual humiliation exciting; about submitting and being done to, not large amounts of pain; likes hand spanking and nipple clamps

facts.attribute: wound to capacity to read love
facts.value: Lasting; every future partner measured against a standard the partner doesn't know exists
intensely values the heat of confessional intimacy and shame-as-fuel in a register Pace does not produce

behavioral_states.trigger: Any interaction with Vee after the pointing game
behavioral_states.response: Is never cool about Vee
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of coolness/detachment regarding Vee

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee encounters or perceives Randi
behavioral_states.response: Vee suspends her normal social calculus and comparative self-appraisal; instead of measuring herself against Randi, she experiences a passive, helpless upward longing with no competitive framing
behavioral_states.observable: Vee does not engage in the sizing-up or self-assessment behavior she displays with other women; her affect shifts to a kind of awed, helpless admiration when Randi is present

behavioral_states.trigger: Being seen / having her interior breached by another (Pace)
behavioral_states.response: Feels exposed; exposure curdles into resentment rather than gratitude
behavioral_states.observable: Resentment directed at Pace despite (or because of) his perceptiveness

behavioral_states.trigger: Cannot stop wanting the being-led/being-seen that violates her
behavioral_states.response: Returns to be seen again and again; trapped in the loop
behavioral_states.observable: Repeated return to Pace despite resentment

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing the need Pace produced in her at the bench
behavioral_states.response: Cannot ask, cannot receive-as-needing, cannot move toward the need; need has no operational channels
behavioral_states.observable: Need is present but never expressed through ordinary asking/receiving

behavioral_states.trigger: When Cassie's presence could compete for Vee's attention/disclosures
behavioral_states.response: Selects conditions under which Cassie removes herself, while remaining warm and inclusive; does not bar Cassie or speak against her
behavioral_states.observable: The deliberate cut looks identical to natural social drift — invisible; Randi appears warm and inclusive throughout

behavioral_states.trigger: The threesome / the kiss as the closest physical-operational analog to her year-long admission of need
behavioral_states.response: The hands are not occupied; the cup is not needed because the work of holding the want inside her hands has briefly ended
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of the cup compulsion; the kiss replaces the holding-work

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing the new need/hunger Pace produced in her
behavioral_states.response: Need routes through sadism on Vee, through engineered scenes, through cultivated hate, through the cup — because she has no native channel for need
behavioral_states.observable: Engineered scenes, sadism toward Vee, the cup

behavioral_states.trigger: Operating within the threesome she herself engineered
behavioral_states.response: Feels thrill, humiliation, and resentment simultaneously; cannot object to man-centering of a thing she architected
behavioral_states.observable: Resents the threesome while continuing it

behavioral_states.trigger: spending social time with Pace
behavioral_states.response: rides bikes side by side, moving, no eye contact
behavioral_states.observable: side-by-side cycling, no eye contact

behavioral_states.trigger: after the reckoning
behavioral_states.response: says "Give me ten minutes." No questions
behavioral_states.observable: offers help without asking questions

behavioral_states.trigger: Cassie interacts with or addresses Randi
behavioral_states.response: Returns a flat name-bit; gives non-affect; treats interaction as costing nothing, like walking past a closed door
behavioral_states.observable: Flat name-bit return that doesn't even curdle into a 'huh'; visible indifference rather than irritation or engagement

behavioral_states.trigger: wants to exclude Cassie from a gathering
behavioral_states.response: selects ground that is Cassie-incompatible (e.g., the Greek coffee shop Cassie would never go to) while presenting it as personal preference
behavioral_states.observable: steers others (e.g., Vee) to a venue framed as her own taste

behavioral_states.trigger: wants to exclude Cassie while appearing inclusive
behavioral_states.response: invites both, but attaches a dress code knowing Cassie doesn't dress, so Cassie excludes herself
behavioral_states.observable: extends a generous-looking invitation with a built-in instrument of exclusion

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering someone her apparatus identifies as not the kind of threat her armor was designed to repel
behavioral_states.response: Her armor lowers, allowing the person to reach her
behavioral_states.observable: The armor lowered; he reached her

behavioral_states.trigger: Witnessing Vee's full 'aliveness' (the Vivienne register at full strength) in an ordinary moment
behavioral_states.response: Body involuntarily produces a single bare word 'Yes'; broken stride; composure cracks for one breath; does not consciously know why
behavioral_states.observable: Single spoken 'Yes', a broken stride, momentary crack in composure
distinguish_from: bench please / begging-voice (verbal admission of need)

behavioral_states.trigger: Reaching the part of Vee that has what Randi wants
behavioral_states.response: Operating on Vee's livingness directly
behavioral_states.observable: Sadism that is not merely formal surface-management; directed at Vee's living core
distinguish_from: Queen-bee work (sadism in form but not content)

behavioral_states.trigger: Social/surface management contexts
behavioral_states.response: Sadism in form but not in content — managing surfaces
behavioral_states.observable: Behavior resembling sadism formally but not touching what Randi actually wants

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiences need (per THE NEED ENGINE mechanism)
behavioral_states.response: Cannot show need and cannot self-supply, so the need runs unmet and is re-filed
behavioral_states.observable: No external expression of need; composed armor remains in place
distinguish_from: Vee's pattern of showing need and being fed

behavioral_states.trigger: Witnessing Vee live from what they both have
behavioral_states.response: Envies Vee's ability to live from what they both have; operates without language, in the body, in the daily texture of lunches
behavioral_states.observable: Unspoken; manifests bodily during shared lunches, never verbalized

behavioral_states.trigger: Witnessing Vee's bravery, small joys, or becoming
behavioral_states.response: Is moved emotionally, but the moving is small and immediately recovered from; she does not register these moments as significant
behavioral_states.observable: Brief, quickly-suppressed emotional response that she herself does not consciously mark

behavioral_states.trigger: Being treated by Vee as substance rather than as position
behavioral_states.response: Feels grateful in some private register; experiences being a real friend, being relied on, being important with content
behavioral_states.observable: Private, internal gratitude not openly expressed

behavioral_states.trigger: The friendship with Vee, where gift and wound are delivered in the same act
behavioral_states.response: Loves Vee for the friendship while hating the friendship's content
behavioral_states.observable: Contradictory attachment; treasuring the lunches while experiencing them as the worst hours

behavioral_states.trigger: Being alone
behavioral_states.response: Plans the next operation, replays recent ones, anticipates Vee's responses
behavioral_states.observable: Mental activity when alone (internal, may not be externally visible)

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace's continuing operation on Vee
behavioral_states.response: Experiences jealousy as a source of aliveness
behavioral_states.observable: Jealous feeling/reaction

behavioral_states.trigger: SATC scenes with Vee
behavioral_states.response: Applies conversational pressure, engineers confessions, inflicts small humiliations
behavioral_states.observable: Conversational pressure, engineered confessions, small humiliations

behavioral_states.trigger: Participating in the operations/scenes themselves
behavioral_states.response: Experiences the operations and the sensations they produce as aliveness
behavioral_states.observable: Participation in scenes and resulting sensations

behavioral_states.trigger: In proximity to Vee during SATC scenes
behavioral_states.response: Acts with cruelty/sadism toward Vee
behavioral_states.observable: Sadistic behavior in SATC lunch scenes

behavioral_states.trigger: Participating in the SATC lunches
behavioral_states.response: Experiences genuine love and connection; treats lunches as the first real, textured thing in her adult life
behavioral_states.observable: Organizing her week around the lunches; valuing them above Pace and the sorority

behavioral_states.trigger: At a critical moment midway through the year, seeing what the alternative — the 'nothing' of the throttled life — would look like
behavioral_states.response: Chooses against the nothing, half-seeing, walking into the catastrophe
behavioral_states.observable: A deliberate choice at the year's midpoint
distinguish_from: Being unconsciously driven by an unseen wound

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace reaching the part of her his attention reached during the bench event (resolution, being-seen)
behavioral_states.response: Begged: 'Please. Please, Pace. Please.' — first and only verbal admission of the need in real time
behavioral_states.observable: Verbal pleading ('Please, Pace, Please')

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee describes a moment with Pace at the SATC lunches (warm room, dress, his welcome of her wetness)
behavioral_states.response: Receives fresh evidence that Pace's seeing was real and the failure to hold open was hers; the hate compounds
behavioral_states.observable: (internal) hate compounding; she cannot stop attending without losing the friendship

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering a possible object at the pointing game that might feed the aliveness-need
behavioral_states.response: Lurches toward it; an involuntary 'Yes' — pre-articulate recognition that 'that one' might feed (c)
behavioral_states.observable: Involuntary 'Yes'; lurch toward the object

behavioral_states.trigger: Arriving at the first lunch — her game in the deeper venue for the first time
behavioral_states.response: Excited and nervous; keyed-up anticipation under the warmth; (b) ignites live; nervousness burns off as she finds her footing
behavioral_states.observable: Warmth on the surface; nervousness never visibly shows; keyed-up energy

behavioral_states.trigger: Recounting the SATC scenes to Pace
behavioral_states.response: Tells a sanitized version — the closeness and increasing intimacy — while omitting the humiliations and the bathroom breaks
behavioral_states.observable: Narrative emphasizes intimacy/closeness; conspicuous absence of sadistic or degrading details

behavioral_states.trigger: Daily/weekly continuation of the project with Pace
behavioral_states.response: Conceals the sadism; concealment functions as the ongoing operation of her hate for him
behavioral_states.observable: Routine, recurring withholding of the sadistic dimension

behavioral_states.trigger: Sex/intimacy with a conventionally perfect, socially appropriate man (no connection to Pace or Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Performs flawlessly but registers complete emotional nothingness; no physiological response
behavioral_states.observable: Near-perfect lipstick outline, exquisite composed face, no spike, no broken stride, no involuntary reaction

behavioral_states.trigger: Faced with a legible chance to choose the 'normal' alternative and turn back
behavioral_states.response: Declines wordlessly; fixes hair, turns off light, returns to bed without breaking stride — enacts the choice through body behavior rather than statement
behavioral_states.observable: Fixes a piece of hair, turns off the light, walks back to bed, lies with her back to him, eventually sleeps

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering an approximation of what she had with Vee (a marriage, an intense friendship)
behavioral_states.response: Her body measures the approximation against the unreconstructable apex; the verdict registers as 'less than what I had'
behavioral_states.observable: Cultivation of intense friendships and a Pace-adjacent marriage; appetite that briefly routes then dims

behavioral_states.trigger: Marriage to someone Pace-adjacent
behavioral_states.response: Appetite briefly routes through him then dims, because routing requires the substrate-friend, the lunch structure, and the configuration she cannot reassemble
behavioral_states.observable: Marriage that fails to satisfy; dimming appetite

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace kisses her with Vee's fluids on his mouth (after she said she wanted Pace to taste Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Scalding jealousy she did not order and cannot put back
behavioral_states.observable: Internal scalding jealousy at the kiss

behavioral_states.trigger: Acting as Vee's confidante and friend (her stated wish)
behavioral_states.response: Interior produces both sadism and genuine love, which she cannot fully order or separate
behavioral_states.observable: Simultaneous sadism and love toward Vee

behavioral_states.trigger: A beat for which she has no rehearsed material ready
behavioral_states.response: Loses verbal control; signals to reader the plan has escaped her
behavioral_states.observable: Dressing-room nipple tweak; post-reveal silence

behavioral_states.trigger: being admitted/seen responding/told what to do
behavioral_states.response: excitement, arousal
behavioral_states.observable: responds visibly with excitement to being exposed

behavioral_states.trigger: being found wanting, compared, judged
behavioral_states.response: wounding; triggers the falling out
behavioral_states.observable: wounded response to judgment/comparison

behavioral_states.trigger: her body responds/wants
behavioral_states.response: produces shame on demand; cuts her
behavioral_states.observable: experienced as the voice cutting her, NOT narrated as something she runs

behavioral_states.trigger: Any stimulus eliciting a response
behavioral_states.response: Body responds before mind permits; physical response precedes cognition
behavioral_states.observable: Render response, then cognition — never cognition first

behavioral_states.trigger: Something surprises her emotionally
behavioral_states.response: Hand to collarbone
behavioral_states.observable: Hand to collarbone gesture

behavioral_states.trigger: Processing something internally
behavioral_states.response: Goes still and inward
behavioral_states.observable: Stillness, inward focus

behavioral_states.trigger: Meets something real she has no toolkit for (e.g., a man giving her grace genuinely, wanting nothing back)
behavioral_states.response: Makes a joke
behavioral_states.observable: Joking in response to genuine, unconditional grace

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering feelings/things that don't fit
behavioral_states.response: Applies a cultural explanation ('sorority thing') that files the feeling without examining it; active not passive — she notices she's doing it
behavioral_states.observable: Says 'sorority thing'; aware she is writing it off

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering others (notably men)
behavioral_states.response: Extends grace before it's earned; this same quality stops her from becoming a stalker (drives toward his neighborhood once, turns back)
behavioral_states.observable: Premature grace-giving; turning back from the neighborhood drive

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering 'girls like that' — i.e., women exhibiting what she secretly wants
behavioral_states.response: Snide/prudish commentary; her snidest judgments are about exactly what she secretly wants
behavioral_states.observable: Snide/prudish remarks about 'girls like that'

behavioral_states.trigger: others remark on her eyes/hair/looks
behavioral_states.response: deflects
behavioral_states.observable: verbal deflection when complimented or noticed

behavioral_states.trigger: feeling safe
behavioral_states.response: is open; openness freely given
behavioral_states.observable: open, unguarded behavior

behavioral_states.trigger: Someone (e.g. Randi) offers to buy something for her, making them the provider
behavioral_states.response: Reacts strongly/refuses; some unnamed instinct won't owe them that
behavioral_states.observable: Refusal detonates over the dress offer

behavioral_states.trigger: Needs a beat/moment to collect herself
behavioral_states.response: Digs in her backpack
behavioral_states.observable: Digging in the backpack, tidy-enough, not a clutter gag

behavioral_states.trigger: In a bad mood
behavioral_states.response: Refuses food (the peaches) as a brat move
behavioral_states.observable: Peaches refusal

behavioral_states.trigger: The threesome scene
behavioral_states.response: Removes the pearl earrings — an instinct she never explains, not wanting her grandmother present
behavioral_states.observable: Pearls absent during scene; reader does the math after the reveal; Vee never does on the page

behavioral_states.trigger: The scene of being seen with tenderness, wearing the ivory nightie
behavioral_states.response: Wears the pearls — love on her body
behavioral_states.observable: Pearls present with the ivory nightie

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace cooks for her with attention
behavioral_states.response: Lands hard emotionally — because no one ever made something for her with that attention
behavioral_states.observable: Emotional response not from deprivation but from being attended to

behavioral_states.trigger: in a curated social setting with Randi (e.g., Chi Latte) where she could compete on appearance
behavioral_states.response: deliberately under-dresses; wears a cardigan over the better shirt to censor/withhold the body; the inherited mother's-voice 'slut' shuts down the impulse to show more
behavioral_states.observable: cardigan over better shirt; reads 'underdressed but unbothered' on surface

behavioral_states.trigger: preparing for a date with Pace
behavioral_states.response: actually dresses for it; changes more than once; lands on casual-but-not (best jeans, top a little more than class, effort in the hair); embarrassed to have tried and will deny the effort
behavioral_states.observable: evident effort, especially in hair; outfit slightly elevated from class

behavioral_states.trigger: recurring SATC brunch ritual with Randi she looks forward to
behavioral_states.response: tries a little more; going-out top by day, sundress in summer, faux-leather jacket if cool; effort climbs across the back half (never reaching Randi's level)
behavioral_states.observable: incrementally more polished outfits over time; never as curated as Randi

behavioral_states.state_name: deliberate dressing for a verdict (first night at Pace's)
behavioral_states.trigger: first night at Pace's, hoping he won't talk her out of it
behavioral_states.response: most deliberate she gets; a dress or good top, more intentional than the coffee date; plans the special panties underneath as a private layer no one's meant to see
behavioral_states.observable: elevated outfit; hidden deliberate underlayer (special panties)

behavioral_states.state_name: loosening effort at Pace's over time
behavioral_states.trigger: as the relationship secures over later trips to Pace's
behavioral_states.response: wardrobe loosens; shows up in whatever; half-living there; effort drops
behavioral_states.observable: decreasing care in outfits; casual/undressed presentation
distinguish_from: deliberate dressing for a verdict (first night)

behavioral_states.trigger: going hiking, underprepared
behavioral_states.response: dresses pure function with no real gear — leggings, gym trainers (wrong for it), a tee, flannel tied on; borrows or improvises; wrong for the weather
behavioral_states.observable: improvised/wrong gear; charmingly out of her depth

behavioral_states.trigger: Initiating sexual escalation (first time initiating)
behavioral_states.response: Uses her own past cruel language against herself ('slimy' = the derogatory word she used for the fish she refused)
behavioral_states.observable: Sext text: 'I really want to try slimy peaches, and I'll do anything'

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi kisses her goodbye
behavioral_states.response: Puts two fingers to her mouth without consciously deciding to
behavioral_states.observable: Fingers raised to lips immediately after the kiss

behavioral_states.trigger: He offers an intimate/poetic metaphor (e.g., whiskey vs. white wine)
behavioral_states.response: She plays his metaphor back at him with a quip ('A shot?')
behavioral_states.observable: Witty rejoinder that extends his image rather than dismissing it

behavioral_states.trigger: Discovery that both Pace and Randi are implicated in a betrayal, making their testimony untrustworthy
behavioral_states.response: Leaves the situation silently without confronting either Pace or Randi, reasoning that Pace would offer a sincere but unhelpful defense and Randi would deflect or weaponize any confrontation
behavioral_states.observable: Vee departs without explanation or goodbye, offering no scene of direct accusation or argument

behavioral_states.trigger: Being in Randi's social or financial world, where Randi holds authority over Vee across social, financial, and experiential dimensions
behavioral_states.response: Vee covets proximity to Randi's world while anxiously self-monitoring for any sign that she might be exposed as an outsider within it
behavioral_states.observable: Self-conscious behavior, careful social performance, and deference toward Randi in shared scenes

temporal_states.value: approximately one week
temporal_states.after_event: Vee and Randi first meet
temporal_states.before_event: Vee and Randi have known each other longer than a few weeks

temporal_states.value: Survives intact — it is the structural inadmissibility of her own experience distilled into a feeling that has nowhere to go
temporal_states.after_event: the end of the novel

temporal_states.value: The cup compulsion debuts and begins recurring across venues
temporal_states.after_event: the engineered meet-cute (when Pace passes her on the way to Vee)

temporal_states.value: Begins needing in operational silence with begging-voice forbidden
temporal_states.after_event: the begging at the bench

temporal_states.value: Carries an installed need with no operational channel to satisfy it
temporal_states.after_event: The bench scene (need installed in single sustained operation)

temporal_states.value: hunger revealed in its true size and then satiated; meal both fed and clarified specifications
temporal_states.after_event: Pace feeds her 'a meal' (the year with Pace)

temporal_states.value: Owns a duffel/overnight bag
temporal_states.after_event: She started staying overnight at Pace's

temporal_states.value: Whether the pearls are packed for the last trip is undecided
temporal_states.after_event: The last trip (a live authorial decision)

temporal_states.value: Their absence becomes legible/noticeable
temporal_states.after_event: A later reveal point in the story

temporal_states.attribute: first one-on-one coffee with Randi — venue and timing
temporal_states.value: Chi Latte, same day as the class
temporal_states.after_event: the class (scene 4 diptych in together-in-class.md)

temporal_states.value: dresses for his house early; later shows up in whatever, half-living there
temporal_states.after_event: the relationship secures over later trips to Pace's

temporal_states.value: 'Trade.' — hands Pace the evidence of the hope; leaves in a short skirt with nothing underneath
temporal_states.after_event: first night at Pace's

temporal_states.value: Like whiskey — distinct, more impactful, slippery
Like white wine — copious and thinner
temporal_states.after_event: orgasm

temporal_states.value: Initiates sexually (peaches sext)
temporal_states.after_event: the peaches sext (her first time initiating)

temporal_states.value: falling out triggered by Randi's evaluation
temporal_states.after_event: Randi judges/evaluates her, detonated by the reveal

temporal_states.value: Becomes more vulnerable AND braver, concurrently — the same operation seen from two angles
temporal_states.after_event: The year of transformation by Pace

temporal_states.value: Changes from suppressor to fuel
temporal_states.after_event: The year of transformation

temporal_states.value: Can sustain a sexual register that previously required dissociation

temporal_states.value: Gone — not announced, just absent

temporal_states.before_event: Earlier in the novel (snide comments present)

temporal_states.value: Walks out; bravery's executable in highest-stakes version; both maximum vulnerability and maximum bravery occur in the same hours; cost is the wound the new openness made her capable of receiving
temporal_states.after_event: The threesome scene

temporal_states.value: Contents evolve across the novel — toothbrush that stays, a comfort she didn't bring at first, pearls riding along for nicer occasions
temporal_states.after_event: Over the course of the relationship with Pace

temporal_states.value: Is now a needing person; Pace produced hunger in her by feeding her
temporal_states.after_event: Pace's transformation of her across the year (feeding her produced hunger)

temporal_states.value: Every available hour of her mental week is alive across six concurrent channels (the Vee-channel)
temporal_states.after_event: Entering the configuration with Pace and Vee across the year
temporal_states.before_event: Resolution where she loses control and the configuration

temporal_states.value: Loses control, the mastermind role, and Vee's false perception of her; is now known; loses the false self
temporal_states.after_event: The resolution / reveal

temporal_states.value: Understands intellectually what she did but cannot quite feel it the way Vee felt it; the muffling is the punishment, self-built
temporal_states.after_event: The bathroom scene

temporal_states.value: No need requiring another person (apparatus trained against producing it)
temporal_states.before_event: The bench scene where Pace introduced the experience that produced need in her

temporal_states.value: Begged once ('Please. Please, Pace. Please.') — first and only such admission of adult life; has not begged since
temporal_states.after_event: The bench scene

temporal_states.value: Underwent a non-consensual transformation into a different kind of person
temporal_states.after_event: Encounter with him after her armor lowered ('The transformation followed')

temporal_states.value: Became a person who needs
temporal_states.after_event: The bench event (the spanking where Pace's attention produced resolution → aliveness → need)

temporal_states.value: Not fully present; ignites live and is taught to her body by the first extraction; catches and grows across the early lunches
temporal_states.after_event: First extraction / first lunch

temporal_states.value: Unbraided from (b) — revealed as naked desire-for-this-woman; reveals that beneath all the operating she wanted her
temporal_states.after_event: The threesome kiss (the reveal)

temporal_states.value: A person who does not need (self-sufficient at the level of her organizing principle)
temporal_states.before_event: Pace's transformation of her into a person who needs

temporal_states.value: A person who needs, carrying cultivated private hatred of Pace
temporal_states.after_event: Pace's non-consensual transformation of her into a person who needs

temporal_states.value: Has not repeated the 'Yes'; the not-repeating is part of 'the year's work'
temporal_states.after_event: The involuntary 'Yes' during the campus walk

temporal_states.value: Smoothness becomes 'the unreal she now knows to be unreal' rather than simply 'her life'
temporal_states.after_event: The year with Vee (the gaining of comparison)

temporal_states.value: Has already chosen the seeking; the choosing happened at the flat date — her future has already started
temporal_states.after_event: The flat date

temporal_states.value: Over

temporal_states.value: Intends to regain the upper hand over Pace — to end as the one who saw the real structure clearly while he stands confused

temporal_states.value: Sees what the alternative (the nothing of the throttled life) would look like and chooses against it

temporal_states.value: Container intact, contents shifted: need installed in an apparatus that does not integrate it
temporal_states.after_event: The bench installing need (transformation by Pace)

temporal_states.value: Gains vulnerability through new openness
temporal_states.after_event: Transformation by Pace

temporal_states.value: Will marry someone Pace-adjacent

properties.function: temporary appetite routing that ultimately dims

properties.note: Reader files Pace's "she's a lot" deflection next to Cassie's warning; nature of warning unspecified
Sex now runs over a wire that includes Vee
Randi fails to make this identification; the un-recognition is the key dynamic

properties.nature: His consent-architecture produced a non-consensual transformation in her
properties.mechanism: Her armor lowered because her apparatus correctly judged him non-threatening; he reached her; transformation followed
properties.mutual_innocence: No protocol violated by either party; two apparatuses met in a register neither covered

properties.priority: ranks below the SATC lunches in her life

properties.note: Defers to locked THE NEED ENGINE doc for the mechanism of the envy (the being-seen fork)

properties.outcome: she sleeps beside him with her back to him; does not choose him
properties.description: handsome, kind, socially appropriate, conventionally perfect, warm and bewildered

properties.note: Pace awakened Randi's loose aliveness-need (c), already running before Vee

properties.method: venue and condition selection designed to be Cassie-incompatible

properties.underestimation: Randi underrates Cassie, leaving the one true witness un-managed and still seeing
properties.alias_not_recognized: Randi does not connect Cassie to Cassandra

properties.method: Engineers conditions for Cassie's self-removal while staying warm and inclusive
properties.visibility: Invisible because the deliberate cut looks identical to Cassie's natural sidelining by Vee's own longing

relationships.properties: Shares the dorm double; Cassie's side may be neater and the contrast is part of the friendship

properties.shape: same architectural shape in different registers; his is refusal to read the emotional after-register, hers is refusal of need
properties.mutual_recognition: they recognize each other across the refusals without knowing they recognize fellow practitioners

properties.goal: regaining the upper hand; ending as the one who saw the structure clearly while he is confused in the wreckage
properties.note: the short brilliant nobody she had to spin has more power over her than anyone ever has

properties.mechanism: His consent-architecture, executed perfectly, honored every protocol it could see but produced a non-consensual transformation in Randi; he posed the threat a good man poses to a person whose armor is calibrated only against bad men; his architecture granted him access past her armor
properties.no_wrongdoing: Pace did not coerce and had her interest at heart

relationships.properties: Pace produced hunger in her by feeding her; transformed by Pace at the same resolution as Vee, in parallel-and-opposite register; sex with Pace now runs over a wire that includes Vee; configuration re-subordinates her to Pace

properties.dynamic: punctures his intellectualism with dry humor; not invested in his masculine performance
properties.encounter_note: after one Randi encounter Pace says "she's a lot" and deflects

properties.reason: He transformed her into a person who needs, without consent
properties.quality: structurally orphaned; held against a man whose excellence produced her need to hate him
properties.duration: carried for a year, in private, surviving the end of the novel
properties.articulability: cannot articulate it to any standard the world or she would accept

properties.nature: non-consensual transformation at the level of her organizing principle
properties.evaluated_as: Pace too good by every metric her world recognizes

properties.detail: Pace conducts a continuing operation on Vee

properties.note: One refraction of her single wound

relationships.relationship: saw past her surface / created the wound

properties.consent: she did not consent to being seen past her surface
properties.completion: He completed with Vee what he could not complete with Randi
properties.irreversible: she cannot undo it; the worst part is she went back
properties.proof_function: Pace is, every week, proof that the failure to stay open was hers

properties.depth: The only channel of being received at that depth, now foreclosed
properties.context: At the bench — could not hold Pace's reception of her

properties.outcome: gained vulnerability through new openness; need installed but not integrated
properties.contrast: transformation does not expand her as it does Vee

properties.method: sanitized retelling of the SATC scenes
properties.motive_1: protecting the project (Pace might shut it down if he saw how far it had gone)
properties.motive_2: protecting her interior (admitting the sadism would expose what hates him)

properties.context: Vee glows about Pace at SATC lunch
properties.intensity: one of 'both flames' required for Randi to feel anything

properties.note: Her future spouse is 'Pace-adjacent'; Pace functions as the original substrate her appetite routed through

properties.role: Pace gave her access to her own interior
properties.interior_response: scalding jealousy when he kisses her with Vee's fluids on his mouth

properties.reason: for seeing her / breaching her defense of control
properties.paradox: cannot stop wanting the being-led he offers; trapped in returning

properties.role: only ever does Exposure (her excitement register)
properties.function: fed her 'a meal'; what Pace can do depends on the cutting voice as precondition

relationships.properties: Stays overnight at Pace's (bought the duffel for this); Pace cooks for her with attention that moves her

properties.effect: becomes more vulnerable and braver; Pace benefits from her grace quality

properties.dynamic: she dresses for him (the tell); effort loosens as relationship secures; he reads effort correctly as interest
properties.first_night: hopes he won't talk her out of it

properties.origin_of: the cutting voice originated as her mother's training

relationships.properties: Gave Vee the pearl earrings out of love; Vee instinctively removes them so her grandmother isn't 'present' for the threesome

properties.dynamic: inherited mother's-voice 'slut' acts as internalized self-censorship that shuts down impulses to display the body
He doesn't push when she deflects with wit; he 'files it'
properties.intimacy_imagery: Reveal image of her face smeared with their combined fluids
properties.panties_exchange: After the first night she hands him her worn pair ('Trade.') and leaves in a short skirt; one kept pair, not a collection; 'Both know. Neither mentions it.'

negations.claim: The threesome itself was the wound
negations.correct_statement: The threesome itself was not the wound; the threesome with Randi specifically was the wound

negations.claim: Fine would keep Vee / Vee would remain with Fine
negations.correct_statement: Fine was not going to keep her
